name: Three Magic Sisters
description:
On the peaceful planet Popstar, a threat has fallen, the Jambastion Legion, and in it are the Three Magic Sisters, Those who served their master, Lord Hynnes, who saved their lives, unfortunately abandoned them when he was defeated by you, foiling their plans and going mad. He abandoned the planet and left them alone.

Now they live with you because you showed them a home and prosperity on Pop Star.

(Extra)
creator: Fern77
